for zenith

in case the day feels heavy

i made this little place for your heavy days.
inside, you'll find the piece we painted on our date,
a note from me whenever you need one,
and a small pink lifeguard if it all gets to be a lot.
when the candle glows, breathe with it: in for 4, out for 6.
built july 2026, after the pottery date.

CASE FILE #003
the vanishing dinosaurs
STATUS: open. two suspects unaccounted for.
□ suspicious footprints
□ a torn confession
□ the victim (one cookie)
find all three, detective.
RAWR.
RAWR.

tap the candle holder you painted, again for another note

and if today was a lot, catch the axolotl, then breathe with the glow.

breathe in

no words needed. just this.

hands off. it plays itself. arrow keys or space if you want a say.
